SEARCH
Package org.sii.Services

Class MemberService

java.lang.Object
org.sii.Services.MemberService
@Service public class MemberService extends Object
Service layer for managing gym members, including registration, status updates, and capacity validation.

    • MemberService

      public MemberService()

  • Method Details

    • getMembers

      public Iterable<org.sii.DTO.Member.MemberResponse> getMembers()
      Retrieves all members from the system.
      Returns:
      a collection of MemberResponse objects.

    • getMemberById

      public org.sii.DTO.Member.MemberResponse getMemberById(Integer id)
      Finds a member by their unique identifier.
      Parameters:
      id - the unique ID of the member.
      Returns:
      the found member mapped to MemberResponse.
      Throws:
      jakarta.persistence.EntityNotFoundException - if no member exists with the given ID.

    • addMember

      public org.sii.DTO.Member.MemberResponse addMember(org.sii.DTO.Member.MemberRequest dto)
      Registers a new member and assigns them to a specific membership plan.

      Logic: 1. Verifies the existence of the membership plan. 2. Validates if the plan has remaining capacity. 3. Sets the membership start date to the current date. 4. Establishes the relationship between the member and the plan.

      Parameters:
      dto - the registration request data.
      Returns:
      the persisted member as a MemberResponse.
      Throws:
      jakarta.persistence.EntityNotFoundException - if the chosen membership plan does not exist.
      org.sii.Exceptions.CapacityExceededException - if the membership plan is already at full capacity.

    • deactivateMembership

      public void deactivateMembership(Integer id)
      Updates member status to MemberStatus.CANCELLED.
      Parameters:
      id - the unique ID of the member.
      Throws:
      jakarta.persistence.EntityNotFoundException - if the member is not found.
      org.sii.Exceptions.MemberAlreadyInactiveException - if the member is already in CANCELLED status (409 Conflict).

    • activateMembership

      public void activateMembership(Integer id)
      Updates member status to MemberStatus.ACTIVE.
      Parameters:
      id - the unique ID of the member.
      Throws:
      jakarta.persistence.EntityNotFoundException - if the member is not found.
      org.sii.Exceptions.MemberAlreadyActiveException - if the member is already in ACTIVE status (409 Conflict).
